mapper.select: select tc.*, v.vehicle_name, v.infotainment_software_version from test_record tc left join vehicle v on tc.vehicle_id = v.id order by tc.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_questions, SUM(CASE WHEN ts.score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS score_count, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN ts.score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2 ) AS score_percentage FROM test_state ts JOIN test_case tc ON ts.testcase_id = tc.id JOIN test_record tr ON ts.record_id = tr.id WHERE tc.tertiary_metric = #{functionName} AND tr.id = #{vehicleId} -- 特定车辆ID

SELECT -- 任务完成率 total_tests, success_tests, failure_tests, ROUND((success_tests * 100.0) / NULLIF(total_tests, 0), 2) AS score_percentage FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_tests, SUM(CASE WHEN ts.is_successful = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_tests, SUM(CASE WHEN ts.is_successful = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failure_tests FROM test_state ts JOIN test_record tr ON ts.record_id = tr.id WHERE tr.id = #{vehicleId} AND ts.is_successful IN (0, 1) -- 只统计成功和失败的有效测试 ) AS stats;
